title: Create: Tea textures
description: Replaces the textures of some items from the Create mod with textures similar to tea!
body:
# Replaces the textures of some items from the Create mod with tea-like textures!


## The resource pack is actively maintained, and new textures are being actively created.

---
## Items added in v9:
 
Added more than 50+ new textures

---

## The others:
![Textures of tea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qQfMT4Zq/images/9e55b36d6f2a4fa32e3dba21277002047600200d.png)

![Textures of tea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qQfMT4Zq/images/86f940054eba80f70392e8c32ddd25903870bd9f.png)

![Textures of tea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qQfMT4Zq/images/7bcf07134f4e2d3a9f1d9722eb959b46ca50027c.png)




If you would like to share your feedback or help with the textures, we would be happy to hear from you at leha7cool.error@gmail.com!
